details_html:
HSS 4241 Twist Drill Bits - Bright Finish (Uncoated)

The Cost-Effective Choice for General Purpose Drilling

Our HSS 4241 Bright Finish drill bits deliver exceptional value for high-volume hardware distributors and general fabrication workshops. The uncoated, polished surface ensures a low friction coefficient, allowing for incredibly smooth chip evacuation.

  • Smooth Chip Evacuation: The bright, polished flutes prevent materials from sticking to the bit, reducing the risk of clogging.
  • Ideal Materials: Highly recommended for drilling softer materials such as aluminum, brass, copper, plastics, and wood.
  • Economical & Reliable: Provides reliable daily performance at a highly competitive price point, making it a staple for any hardware inventory.

HSS 4241 Twist Drill Bits - Titanium Coated (TiN)

Enhanced Wear Resistance with a Premium Finish

Upgrade your drilling performance with Xiaoman Tools' Titanium-Coated (TiN) HSS 4241 drill bits. The distinct golden Titanium Nitride coating not only gives the tool a premium appearance but significantly increases surface hardness.

  • Increased Surface Hardness: The TiN coating adds a hard protective layer, extending the tool life and keeping the cutting edge sharper for a longer period compared to uncoated bits.
  • Reduced Friction & Heat: The coating acts as a thermal barrier, reducing friction and heat build-up during drilling operations.
  • Versatile Applications: Performs excellently on mild steel, iron, light alloys, and general composite materials.

* Both variants are available in fully customizable packaging (plastic tubes, metal boxes, blister cards) tailored to your brand requirements.

details_html:
Industrial-Grade HSS M2 (6542) Twist Drill Bits

Uncompromising Precision and Durability for Professional Machining

Engineered for demanding industrial environments, our HSS M2 (6542) twist drill bits deliver superior wear resistance and thermal stability. This is the gold standard for hardware professionals seeking continuous, high-speed drilling performance.

Core Advantages

  • Premium M2 Quality: Crafted from top-tier High-Speed Steel (6542), these bits maintain their sharp cutting edges even under high temperatures, ensuring a significantly longer tool life compared to standard bits.
  • Fully Customizable Specifications: Whether you need standard DIN 338 jobber lengths, extra-long lengths, or specific diameter increments, we can manufacture to your exact processing requirements.
  • Tailored OEM Packaging: Elevate your brand. Choose from bulk PVC pouches, individual plastic tubes, or premium multi-piece metal cases. All packaging can be fully customized with your logo and design.
  • Worry-Free After-Sales Support: We stand behind our quality. We offer a strict quality guarantee, fast response times for any technical inquiries, and reliable solutions to ensure your complete purchasing confidence.

Primary Applications

Designed for heavy-duty metalworking. Outstanding performance on carbon steel, alloy steel, cast iron, copper, and aluminum.

details_html:
Industrial Grade HSS M2 (6542) Twist Drill Bits

The Gold Standard for Professional Metalworking

Step up to true industrial performance with Xiaoman Tools' HSS M2 (6542) twist drill bits. Engineered for durability, high heat resistance, and precise cutting, these drill bits are the reliable backbone for any serious manufacturing or fabrication demand.

Versatile Surface Finishes (Coatings)

We understand that different markets require specific surface treatments. We manufacture and supply multiple finish options to match your exact applications:

  • Titanium Coated (TiN / Golden Finish): Features a premium golden nitride coating that significantly increases surface hardness, reduces friction, and extends tool life up to 3 times longer than standard bits.
  • Bright Finish (Uncoated / White): Polished, smooth surface design. Ideal for maximizing chip flow and preventing material build-up when drilling aluminum, plastics, and softer metals.
  • Black Oxide: A classic industrial finish offering enhanced corrosion resistance and excellent cutting fluid retention.

Comprehensive Sizes & Premium Quality

  • Full Range of Specifications: Available in all standard metric and imperial sizes, including fractional, wire gauge, and letter sizes. We deliver precise dimensions to meet global industrial standards.
  • Strict Quality Control: Every batch undergoes rigorous inspection for concentricity, hardness, and edge sharpness to guarantee consistent, wobble-free drilling performance.

Rich Packaging & OEM Solutions

Stand out in your local market with our comprehensive packaging solutions. Whether you are supplying hardware distributors or industrial end-users, we provide:

  • Individual PVC pouches and sturdy plastic tubes.

details_html:
Premium HSS-Co M35 & M42 Cobalt Twist Drill Bits

The Ultimate Drilling Solution for Stainless Steel and Hard Alloys

When standard high-speed steel fails, Xiaoman Tools' Cobalt series steps in. Engineered with a premium 5% (M35) or 8% (M42) cobalt alloy, these drill bits deliver extraordinary "red hardness" and thermal stability. They are purpose-built to cut through the most abrasive and tough materials in heavy industrial applications.

Why Choose Our Cobalt Drill Bits?

  • Extreme Heat Resistance: The high cobalt content allows the drill bit to withstand extreme drilling temperatures without losing its sharp cutting edge, drastically reducing tool wear.
  • Classic Amber Finish: The distinctive baked yellow/amber finish is a result of our specialized heat-treatment process, providing excellent lubricity and extended tool life.
  • Precision 135° Split Point: Designed to prevent "walking" or wandering on the material surface. It requires less feed pressure and ensures instant, self-centering penetration.

Comprehensive Sizes & OEM Packaging

We supply a complete range of specifications to meet the diverse demands of your local market:

  • Full Size Range: Available in metric (1.0mm - 20.0mm) and all equivalent imperial sizes.
  • Tailored Packaging Options: Build your brand with our premium packaging. We offer individual PVC pouches, high-quality plastic tubes, blister cards for retail, and professional metal index sets (13pcs, 19pcs, 25pcs).
  • Custom Branding: We support custom laser engraving of your logo and size specifications directly on the drill shank, ensuring brand visibility on every tool.

Target Applications

Highly recommended for professional machining of Stainless Steel (304/316), Titanium Alloys, Cast Iron, Hardened Steel, and Aerospace Alloys.

name: Through-Coolant Solid Carbide Drill Bit
description: High-Performance Solid Carbide Drill Bit with Through-Coolant (3xD / 5xD / 8xD)

specs.Workpiece Materials: Stainless steel, titanium alloy, cast iron, spring steel
specs.Machine Setup: CNC machining center, engraving machine, precision engraving machine, lathe
specs.Instant Heat Dissipation: Internal coolant flows direjctly to the drill tip, preventing thermal cracking, tool burnout, and material work-hardening during high-speed operations.
specs.Flawless Chip Evacuation: The high-pressure coolant forcefully flushes chips out of the flutes instantly, completely eliminating chip packing and the risk of drill breakage in deep blind holes.
specs.Higher Feed & Speed Rates: Achieves up to 2-3 times the penetration rate of external-coolant carbide drills, drastically reducing cycle times.

details_html:
Advanced Solid Carbide Through-Coolant Drills

Unleash the Full Potential of Your CNC Machining Centers

Engineered for high-speed and high-feed drilling, Xiaoman Tools' advanced solid carbide through-coolant drill bits are the ultimate solution for demanding manufacturing environments. By delivering high-pressure cutting fluid directly to the cutting zone, these tools eliminate heat build-up and guarantee flawless chip evacuation even in deep-hole applications.

Key Technical Innovations

  • Dual Internal Coolant Channels: Forces coolant straight to the drill tip. This critical feature flushes out chips instantly, prevents material from welding to the edge, and ensures excellent hole finish.
  • High-Performance Nano-Coating: The distinct bronze/copper colored AlTiN/TiAlN nano-coating provides extreme thermal stability and oxidation resistance, allowing for significantly higher cutting speeds and extending tool life.
  • Micro-Grain Solid Tungsten Carbide: Built from premium ultra-fine grain carbide substrate, offering the perfect combination of supreme hardness and vital toughness to resist chipping under heavy CNC loads.
  • Precision Self-Centering Geometry: The optimized point angle and specialized web thinning eliminate the need for center drilling, ensuring accurate hole positioning from the very first touch.

OEM Packaging & Brand Customization

As a professional supplier, we offer flexible OEM solutions to help you build your brand locally:

  • Custom laser etching of your logo and specifications on the drill shank.
  • Premium individual plastic tubes with secure end-caps to prevent transit damage.
  • Customized labeling with your brand's barcode and product details.

Target Applications

Designed for mass production efficiency. Excels in machining Carbon Steel, Alloy Steel, Cast Iron, Tool Steel, and Stainless Steel. Available in various depth ratios including 3xD, 5xD, and 8xD.
